title: EvidenceRef
description: Stable pointer to a support item with source identity, release scope, rights/sensitivity, review state, and integrity linkage. A reference is not proof by itself.

evidence_ref_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this evidence reference.

domain.description: Ecological or data domain this evidence covers.

ref.description: Pointer to the underlying evidence artifact (URI or path).

release_state.description: Lifecycle release state. Only PUBLISHED or CATALOG evidence may be cited on public surfaces.

digest.description: Optional sha256 digest for integrity verification.

sensitivity.description: Policy sensitivity label for rights and access control.

review_state.description: Review or approval state for this evidence reference.

promotion_receipt_ref.description: Optional reference to the PromotionReceipt that approved this evidence for public use.
